## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss implementation of interactive invoice and incident report templates for Smith.ai website, focusing on user experience and PDF functionality.](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [MVP: Create printable 8.5x11" PDF templates for invoice and incident report, with a customized "send to email" button on a dedicated webpage](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Design polish needed: Consistent spacing, alignment, and formatting for professional appearance](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [User experience considerations: Balancing interactivity with printability, clear instructions for users](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

## Topics

### PDF Template Design and Functionality

  - [Need for 8.5x11" dimension to ensure proper printing](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Consider limiting text input fields to prevent overflow in PDF](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Potential for two versions: interactive playground and fixed template for clean printing](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Ensure consistent formatting, spacing, and alignment for professional appearance](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Add disclaimer explaining template usage and customization options](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)

### Implementation Challenges

  - [Webflow limitations for server-side processes (PDF generation, email sending)](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Zapier suggested as a potential solution for handling backend processes](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Need to identify Webflow-compatible plugins for PDF generation and email functionality](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

### User Experience Considerations

  - [Create dedicated webpage for templates (e.g., smith.ai/templates/home-services/invoice)](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Include clear instructions for users on template usage and limitations](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Design mobile-friendly version while maintaining printability](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Balance interactivity with clean, professional output](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

### MVP Features

  - [Printable 8.5x11" PDF templates for invoice and incident report](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Customized "send to email" button on dedicated webpage](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Ability to email blank, fillable PDF template to users](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Consider pop-up modal for email capture and template delivery](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to create finalized 8.5x11" PDF designs for invoice and incident report templates](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Volodymyr to research Webflow-compatible plugins for PDF generation and email functionality](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [GrowthX to define exact MVP features and user flow for template interaction](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to review proposed MVP implementation plan](https://fathom.video/share/KsKVWy1ysAQ1bgVWj69thGJx1J5x1Gvm?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
